gt_sql: SELECT T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId GROUP BY T1.DisplayName ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Id) DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT TRIM(u.DisplayName) AS DisplayName
FROM badges b
JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id
GROUP BY b.UserId, TRIM(u.DisplayName)
ORDER BY COUNT(b.Name) DESC
LIMIT 1
question: What is the display name of the user who acquired the highest amount of badges?
